items.original_text: Fair expectations Nick shirley: Does it make you “far right” to want: - vetted immigration - no digital ID - lower taxes - no two-tier policing - free speech - pedophiles out of office - lower cost of living MSM and politicians will call these ladies far right. Does this sound far right to you or just right?
items.zh_text: 合理的期望，尼克·雪莉：想要以下这些会让你成为“极右翼”吗？- 经过审查的移民 - 无数字身份证 - 降低税收 - 无双重标准执法 - 言论自由 - 恋童癖者不得任职 - 降低生活成本。主流媒体和政客们会称这些女士为极右翼。这对你来说听起来是极右翼，还是仅仅是正确？

items.original_text: Introducing OpenAI Guaranteed Capacity: a new offering that enables customers to guarantee long-term access to OpenAI compute. We’ve made long-term investments in infrastructure, partnerships, and capacity planning to help customers scale reliably. Now, Guaranteed Capacity helps customers plan ahead for critical workloads in a compute-constrained world. http://openai.com/guaranteed-capacity
items.zh_text: OpenAI 推出保障容量服务：一项新服务，让客户能够确保长期使用 OpenAI 的计算资源。我们在基础设施、合作伙伴关系和容量规划方面进行了长期投资，以帮助客户可靠地扩展业务。现在，保障容量服务帮助客户在计算资源受限的环境中提前规划关键工作负载。

items.original_text: We’re adding new ways for people to identify AI-generated images and understand where they came from. In addition to C2PA Content Credentials, images now also contain a SynthID watermark, and can be identified using a public verification tool to check whether an image was made by OpenAI products. https://openai.com/index/advancing-content-provenance/
items.zh_text: 我们正在增加新的方式，让人们识别AI生成的图像并了解其来源。除了C2PA内容凭证外，图像现在还包含SynthID水印，并且可以使用公开验证工具来检查图像是否由OpenAI产品生成。

items.original_text: Personal update: I've joined Anthropic. I think the next few years at the frontier of LLMs will be especially formative. I am very excited to join the team here and get back to R&D. I remain deeply passionate about education and plan to resume my work on it in time.
items.zh_text: 个人动态：我已加入Anthropic。我认为未来几年在大语言模型前沿领域将尤其具有塑造性。我非常兴奋能加入这里的团队并重返研发工作。我依然对教育充满热情，并计划适时恢复在这方面的努力。

In addition to C2PA Content Credentials, images now also contain a SynthID watermark, and can be identified using a public verification tool to check whether an image was made
items.zh_text: 用于检查图像是否由OpenAI生成的SynthID：OpenAI：我们正在增加新的方式，让人们识别AI生成的图像并了解其来源。除了C2PA内容凭证外，图像现在还包含SynthID水印，并可通过公共验证工具来检查图像是否由OpenAI制作。

items.original_text: RT Flow by Google Introducing your agent and the all-new Gemini Omni model in Google Flow. #GoogleIO ✨ Think of your agent as a creative partner. It reasons through complex tasks and helps you brainstorm, create, and edit, all while under your direction. ⚡ Gemini Omni is where Gemini’s intelligence meets our generative media models. Think of it as Nano Banana but for video. It is a major leap forward in world understanding, multimodality, and editing. Try all the latest Google Flow updates from I/O today at http://flow.google.
items.zh_text: Google DeepMind：Google Flow 推出你的智能体与全新 Gemini Omni 模型。#GoogleIO ✨ 将你的智能体视为创意伙伴。它能推理复杂任务，并在你的指导下助你头脑风暴、创作和编辑。⚡ Gemini Omni 是 Gemini 智能与我们的生成式媒体模型的结合。可以将其视为面向视频的 Nano Banana。这是世界理解、多模态和编辑能力的一次重大飞跃。立即在 http://flow.google 体验来自 I/O 的所有最新 Google Flow 更新。

items.original_text: Google Flow 🤝 Gemini Omni Create more cinematic stories with our latest model, which brings batch editing, improved character consistency and more. Here’s what else is new for @FlowbyGoogle → https://goo.gle/42K2nge #GoogleIO
items.zh_text: Google Flow 🤝 Gemini Omni 使用我们的最新模型创作更具电影感的故事，该模型带来了批量编辑、改进的角色一致性等功能。以下是 @FlowbyGoogle 的其他新功能 → https://goo.gle/42K2nge #GoogleIO

items.original_text: RT koray kavukcuoglu Today at Google I/O, we introduced Gemini 3.5 Flash! It has become an integral part of our daily research cycle and works with all the tools we have at Google. We used a team of agents in Antigravity 2.0 to recreate the original AlphaZero research paper and build a playable version. They coded the reinforcement learning pipeline in JAX/Flax, trained a ResNet model from scratch via self-play on multi-TPU pods, and shipped a full-stack web app so you can play against it, from just 2 prompts. . Here’s what else makes 3.5 Flash special 🧵
items.zh_text: 谷歌DeepMind：转发自Koray Kavukcuoglu。今天在Google I/O大会上，我们推出了Gemini 3.5 Flash！它已成为我们日常研究周期中不可或缺的一部分，并与我们在谷歌拥有的所有工具协同工作。我们使用Antigravity 2.0中的一组智能体，重现了原始的AlphaZero研究论文，并构建了一个可玩的版本。他们用JAX/Flax编写了强化学习流水线，通过多TPU Pod上的自我对弈从头训练了一个ResNet模型，并部署了一个全栈网页应用，让你只需2个提示就能与之对战。以下是让3.5 Flash与众不同的其他特点🧵

items.original_text: RT Sundar Pichai We’re ready, are you?
items.zh_text: 转发 Sundar Pichai：我们准备好了，你呢？

items.original_text: Whitepill. Robi Rahman: 1/ With distributed training, you could violate an AI pause treaty by training a GPT-4-scale model over consumer internet, using hardware below every proposed compute governance threshold, for under $100M. My new paper in @taig_icml explains how to catch this and shut it down.
items.zh_text: 白丸。Robi Rahman：1/ 通过分布式训练，你可以利用低于所有拟议计算治理阈值的硬件，在消费级互联网上训练一个GPT-4规模的模型，从而违反AI暂停条约，成本不到1亿美元。我在@taig_icml上的新论文解释了如何发现并阻止这种行为。

items.original_text: Exactly. Josiah Lippincott: "Mass displacement" of workers in a growing economy is not a problem. After WWII, millions of men left military service and started looking for private sector work. The result was not impoverishment but an economic boom. This was entirely predictable. Labor is an asset. The
items.zh_text: 完全正确。Josiah Lippincott：在增长的经济中，工人的“大规模转移”不是问题。二战后，数百万男性离开军队并开始寻找私营部门的工作。结果不是贫困，而是经济繁荣。这完全是可预见的。劳动力是一种资产。

items.original_text: Gemini 3.5 Flash is here!!! 🚀🚀 Priced at 3x it's predecessor but still WAY CHEAPER than GPT 5.5 or Opus 4.7 We are evaluating the model against a bunch of real-world quality evals. Results coming later today

items.original_text: There is no doubt Gemini will max benchmarks - they always do The only question is whether it’s actually a good model or will it simply be a benchmaxxed model
items.zh_text: 毫无疑问，Gemini 会在基准测试中达到最高分——他们总是如此。唯一的问题是，它到底是一个好模型，还是仅仅是一个刷榜模型。

items.original_text: We’re shipping a CDN pricing model that “smooths over” traffic spikes and viral events. This allows us to remove stress and surprises, with uncompromising quality and network performance. Predictability without slow routes, degraded PoPs, or priority bandwidth tiers. Vercel Developers: Flat Rate CDN is in Limited Beta for Pro teams. You pay a fixed monthly fee for Vercel CDN usage, with no overages for viral spikes, unfiltered bots, or misconfigured routes. Join the waitlist ↓https://vercel.com/changelog/flat-rate-cdn-in-limited-beta
items.zh_text: 我们正在推出一种能够“平滑”流量高峰和病毒式传播事件的CDN定价模式。这让我们能够消除压力和意外，同时保持无妥协的质量和网络性能。可预测性，无需慢速路由、降级PoP或优先级带宽层级。Vercel开发者：Pro团队的固定费率CDN现已进入有限Beta测试。您只需为Vercel CDN使用支付固定月费，无需为病毒式流量激增、未过滤的机器人或配置错误的路由支付额外费用。加入等候名单 ↓https://vercel.com/changelog/flat-rate-cdn-in-limited-beta

Run agents inside your own perimeter, with your security controls applied by default.

items.original_text: Keep your Mac awake so you can build and work from your phone, with Codex in the ChatGPT app: OpenAI Developers: Your Mac can hold down the fort while you work from your phone. Enable remote connection in the Codex desktop app, then turn on “Keep this Mac awake.” When your Mac is powered on and plugged in, Codex can keep running there while you work from the ChatGPT mobile app.
items.zh_text: 让你的 Mac 保持唤醒状态，这样你就可以通过 ChatGPT 应用中的 Codex 在手机上构建和工作：OpenAI 开发者：你的 Mac 可以在你通过手机工作时坚守岗位。在 Codex 桌面应用中启用远程连接，然后开启“保持此 Mac 唤醒”。当你的 Mac 通电并接通电源时，Codex 可以继续在那里运行，而你则通过 ChatGPT 移动应用工作。

items.original_text: how to use /goal in codex — keep Codex working on a persistent objective until it's solved: Derrick Choi: My colleagues wrote up a great post on using Goals in Codex. They go through when to use them, what changes when a Goal is active, and how to write Goals that give Codex a clear outcome, constraints and verification criteria. Also how we designed Goals at the architecture level
items.zh_text: 如何在 Codex 中使用 /goal —— 让 Codex 持续朝着一个固定目标工作，直到问题解决：Derrick Choi：我的同事们写了一篇关于在 Codex 中使用 Goals 的精彩文章。他们介绍了何时使用 Goals、Goal 激活后会发生什么变化，以及如何编写能向 Codex 提供清晰结果、约束条件和验证标准的 Goals。还介绍了我们在架构层面是如何设计 Goals 的。

items.original_text: Anthropic is acquiring @stainlessapi, an SDK and MCP server platform that has powered every Anthropic SDK since the earliest days of our API. Read more: https://www.anthropic.com/news/anthropic-acquires-stainless
items.zh_text: Anthropic 正在收购 @stainlessapi，这是一个 SDK 和 MCP 服务器平台，自我们 API 早期以来就一直为每个 Anthropic SDK 提供支持。了解更多：https://www.anthropic.com/news/anthropic-acquires-stainless

items.original_text: RT Daniel Jeffries Finally a semi-useful read on Mythos that is free of myth and talks about what this means more practically (not this is the end of the world as we know it, but how do we deal with faster patches and attacks from AI as other models scale to chained exploits)? This is the kind of conversation we need, not idiotic ones about the end of all software. We need "what is the right answer?" because these models are coming and will get better so how to we put our heads together and make better/more secure software across the world? And it can't just be patching the 100 or so projects that got access to Project Glasswing. That is not gonna help the world. We need to figure out how does everyone else who is not part of the special chosen people to get blessed with access to test and patch their stuff, aka the open source projects and closed software that is not Office or Cloudflare but the 99.99% of software that runs everything else in the world? What is the right loop cycle to help people patch and fix things at the source? In the long run, AI will make software more secure, not less. But it will change how teams have to work to get there. Figuring that out means putting it in more team's hands sooner rather than later. Cloudflare: Cloudflare's security team spent the last few weeks testing Anthropic's Mythos against fifty of our own repositories. What we learned about offensive AI, why faster patching is the wrong reaction, and what the architecture around vulnerabilities has to look like next.
items.zh_text: Yann LeCun 转发了 Daniel Jeffries 的推文：终于有一篇关于 Mythos 的半实用读物，它没有神话色彩，而是更实际地讨论了这意味着什么（这不是我们所知的世界末日，而是当其他模型扩展到连锁利用时，我们如何应对更快的补丁和来自 AI 的攻击）？这才是我们需要的对话，而不是那些关于所有软件终结的愚蠢言论。我们需要问“正确答案是什么？”，因为这些模型正在到来，并且会变得更好，所以我们如何集思广益，在全球范围内制造更好/更安全的软件？而且这不能仅仅修补那大约 100 个获得 Project Glasswing 访问权限的项目。那对世界没有帮助。我们需要弄清楚，那些不属于被特别选中、有幸获得访问权限来测试和修补自己东西的人，即开源项目和不是 Office 或 Cloudflare 的闭源软件，而是运行世界上其他一切的 99.99% 的软件，他们该怎么办？什么是正确的循环周期，以帮助人们从源头修补和修复问题？从长远来看，AI 将使软件更安全，而不是更不安全。但这将改变团队实现这一目标的工作方式。弄清楚这一点意味着要尽早将这一能力交到更多团队手中。Cloudflare：Cloudflare 的安全团队在过去几周里，针对我们自己的 50 个代码仓库测试了 Anthropic 的 Mythos。我们学到了关于进攻性 AI 的知识，为什么更快的修补是错误的反应，以及漏洞周围的架构接下来必须是什么样子。

items.original_text: RT Andrew Weinstein When a federal agency tasked with protecting all Americans decides to mandate a specific religious worldview, it ceases to protect democracy and begins to threaten it.
items.zh_text: 转发 Andrew Weinstein：当一个负责保护所有美国人的联邦机构决定强制推行特定的宗教世界观时，它就不再保护民主，而是开始威胁民主。

items.original_text: RT nic carter Re This is the single most important chart. If AI were driving prices, you'd see a cluster top-right. You don't. States with huge load growth (VA, TX, NV, ND, IA) sit at ~0c change in 5y. States with massive price hikes (CA, NY, MA, CT) have basically NO load growth.
items.zh_text: 转发 @nic carter：这是唯一最重要的图表。如果人工智能在推动价格上涨，你会看到右上角聚集一片。但事实并非如此。负荷大幅增长的州（弗吉尼亚州、得克萨斯州、内华达州、北达科他州、爱荷华州）5年内电价变化约为0美分。而电价大幅上涨的州（加利福尼亚州、纽约州、马萨诸塞州、康涅狄格州）基本上没有负荷增长。

items.original_text: RT David Weston (DWIZZZLE) http://cybergym.io just updated its leaderboard and MDASH is now #1 using a new multi-model approach. Huge credit to Taesoo Kim and the Autonomous Code Security team for pushing the frontier on AI-driven vulnerability discovery and defense https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/security/blog/2026/05/12/defense-at-ai-speed-microsofts-new-multi-model-agentic-security-system-tops-leading-industry-benchmark/
items.zh_text: RT David Weston (DWIZZZLE) http://cybergym.io 刚刚更新了其排行榜，MDASH 现在采用新的多模型方法排名第一。非常感谢 Taesoo Kim 和自主代码安全团队在推动 AI 驱动的漏洞发现与防御前沿方面所做的贡献 https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/security/blog/2026/05/12/defense-at-ai-speed-microsofts-new-multi-model-agentic-security-system-tops-leading-industry-benchmark/

items.original_text: Our new multi-model agentic security system brings together more than 100 specialized agents across frontier and custom models to find exploitable bugs, delivering top performance on the CyberGym benchmark. We used it ahead of Patch Tuesday to help find and fix 16 vulnerabilities. Today we’re announcing that customers can sign up to test it in private preview. https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/security/blog/2026/05/12/defense-at-ai-speed-microsofts-new-multi-model-agentic-security-system-tops-leading-industry-benchmark/?v=1
items.zh_text: 我们的新型多模型自主安全系统整合了超过100个专业智能体，涵盖前沿模型和定制模型，用于发现可利用漏洞，在CyberGym基准测试中取得了顶级性能。我们在补丁星期二之前使用了该系统，帮助发现并修复了16个漏洞。今天，我们宣布客户可以注册参与私人预览测试。

items.original_text: PayPal runs 74,000 weekly tasks in Perplexity Enterprise. Teams use it for model validation, channel performance, market trend research, competitive intelligence, and product analysis. Read the customer story: https://www.perplexity.ai/enterprise/customers/paypal
items.zh_text: PayPal 每周在 Perplexity Enterprise 上运行 74,000 个任务。团队将其用于模型验证、渠道表现、市场趋势研究、竞争情报和产品分析。阅读客户案例：https://www.perplexity.ai/enterprise/customers/paypal

items.original_text: This works really well btw, at the end of your query ask your LLM to "structure your response as HTML", then view the generated file in your browser. I've also had some success asking the LLM to present its output as slideshows, etc. More generally, imo audio is the human-preferred input to AIs but vision (images/animations/video) is the preferred output from them. Around a ~third of our brains are a massively parallel processor dedicated to vision, it is the 10-lane superhighway of information into brain. As AI improves, I think we'll see a progression that takes advantage: 1) raw text (hard/effortful to read) 2) markdown (bold, italic, headings, tables, a bit easier on the eyes) <-- current default 3) HTML (still procedural with underlying code, but a lot more flexibility on the graphics, layout, even interactivity) <-- early but forming new good default ...4,5,6,... n) interactive neural videos/simulations Imo the extrapolation (though the technology doesn't exist just yet) ends in some kind of interactive videos generated directly by a diffusion neural net. Many open questions as to how exact/procedural "Software 1.0" artifacts (e.g. interactive simulations) may be woven together with neural artifacts (diffusion grids), but generally something in the direction of the recently viral https://x.com/zan2434/status/2046982383430496444 There are also improvements necessary and pending at the input. Audio nor text nor video alone are not enough, e.g. I feel a need to point/gesture to things on the screen, similar to all the things you would do with a person physically next to you and your computer screen. TLDR The input/output mind meld between humans and AIs is ongoing and there is a lot of work to do and significant progress to be made, way before jumping all the way into neuralink-esque BCIs and all that. For what's worth exploring at the current stage, hot tip try ask for HTML. Thariq: http://x.com/i/article/2052796100608974848
items.zh_text: 顺便说一句，这个方法真的很管用：在提问结束时，让你的大语言模型“以 HTML 格式组织回答”，然后在浏览器中查看生成的文件。我还曾成功让大语言模型以幻灯片等形式呈现输出。更广泛地说，在我看来，音频是人类偏好的 AI 输入方式，但视觉（图像/动画/视频）是偏好的输出方式。我们大脑中大约三分之一的部分是一个专门处理视觉的大规模并行处理器，它是信息进入大脑的 10 车道超级高速公路。随着 AI 的进步，我认为我们会看到一系列利用这一点的进展：1) 纯文本（阅读起来费力/费劲）2) Markdown（粗体、斜体、标题、表格，对眼睛稍微友好一些）<-- 当前默认 3) HTML（仍然有底层代码的过程性，但在图形、布局甚至交互性上灵活得多）<-- 早期但正在形成新的良好默认值 ...4,5,6,... n) 交互式神经视频/模拟。我认为外推（尽管技术尚未存在）最终会走向由扩散神经网络直接生成的某种交互式视频。关于“软件 1.0”产物（例如交互式模拟）如何与神经产物（扩散网格）精确/过程性地交织在一起，还有许多悬而未决的问题，但大致方向类似于最近爆火的 https://x.com/zan2434/status/2046982383430496444。在输入方面也有必要且待进行的改进。仅靠音频、文本或视频是不够的，例如，我觉得需要指向/比划屏幕上的东西，就像你和一个真人一起站在电脑屏幕前时所做的所有事情一样。TLDR：人类与 AI 之间的输入/输出思维融合正在进行中，还有很多工作要做，并且需要取得重大进展，远在直接跳到 Neuralink 式的脑机接口等之前。就现阶段值得探索的内容而言，一个小窍门是尝试要求输出 HTML。Thariq: http://x.com/i/article/2052796100608974848
items.media_note: 该动态可能包含 X 原生媒体，当前 RSS 未提供视频文件，请打开原帖观看。

items.original_text: Excel has quietly been Turing complete for a long time. Nice to see it now edging toward "AI complete"—SGD, attention, next-token prediction… all in cells. Austin Henley: Excel Copilot one-shotted a tiny GPT-style language model for me inside a spreadsheet: embeddings, causal attention, weights trained with stochastic gradient descent, next-token prediction, and a live slider to watch it learn.
items.zh_text: Excel 早已悄然图灵完备。如今它正迈向“AI 完备”——随机梯度下降、注意力机制、下一词元预测……全在单元格里实现，令人欣喜。Austin Henley：Excel Copilot 在电子表格中为我一次性构建了一个微型 GPT 风格语言模型：嵌入层、因果注意力、通过随机梯度下降训练的权重、下一词元预测，以及一个实时滑块来观察学习过程。

items.original_text: This is the the quote I've been citing a lot recently. kache: you can outsource your thinking but you cannot outsource your understanding
items.zh_text: 这是我最近经常引用的一句话。kache：你可以外包你的思考，但你不能外包你的理解。

items.original_text: RT Dan Scavino Jr.🇺🇸🦅 On behalf of Erin and me, thank you to everyone for the love and support we've received. We both had an unforgettable wedding day, and we'll never forget it. We're humbled and grateful to all. THANK YOU! 🙏🏻🇺🇸🦅🚀
items.zh_text: 转发 Dan Scavino Jr.🇺🇸🦅 代表 Erin 和我，感谢大家给予我们的爱与支持。我们度过了一个难忘的婚礼日，永远不会忘记。我们谦卑而感激所有人。谢谢你们！🙏🏻🇺🇸🦅🚀

items.original_text: RT Fox News RECORD BREAKER: “Melania,” a documentary following the first lady in the 20 days before President Trump’s second inauguration, earns $8 million opening weekend — reportedly making it the biggest documentary debut in more than a decade.
items.zh_text: 转发福克斯新闻 破纪录者：《梅拉尼娅》——一部记录特朗普总统第二次就职前20天第一夫人生活的纪录片，首周末票房收入800万美元——据报道，这是十多年来纪录片首映票房最高的一次。
